title: Use stream_insert with at: 0 on broadcast
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/notifications_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.NotificationsLive). mount/3 returns {:ok, stream(socket, :notifications, [])}. handle_info({:notification, n}, socket) must call stream_insert(socket, :notifications, n, at: 0) and return {:noreply, ...}. Render <div id="notifications" phx-update="stream"> with :for iteration.
tier_rationale: Single-line stream insert with known at: 0 positional.
